/usr/sbin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/build-index.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/build-index.dir/src/build_index.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/build-index.dir/src/pbf_reader.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/build-index.dir/src/s2_helpers.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/build-index.dir/src/ring_assembly.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/build-index.dir/src/cache.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/build-index.dir/src/continent_filter.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/build-index.dir/src/continent_boundaries.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/build-index.dir/src/cell_index.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/build-index.dir/src/interpolation.cpp.o" -o build-index  -ls2 /usr/lib/libz.so /usr/lib/libbz2.so /usr/lib/libexpat.so
